Function.Inference: Intro section ending with a |: repeat sign at bar 6.
Main loop body of the track, ending with a :| repeat sign at bar 74.

Section.Inference: Introductory passage building up to the main loop.
First main theme establishing the primary melody and rhythmic structure.
Theme A repeated an octave higher with richer texture and harmonization.
New contrasting thematic section featuring sustained chords and long notes.
Modulation to A major introducing a brand new melodic idea.
Modulation back to Db major with a new lyrical string-like melody.
Theme D repeated an octave higher leading into a climactic transition.
Non-thematic transitional bars sustaining chords to bridge back to the loop start.
